observedMutationClass: rule-harness static scan, presentation policy lint stage, fixture tests, and harness README
acceptanceEvidenceClass: rule-harness tests, rules lint, presentation lint, and compile check; no gameplay acceptance evidence
rootCause: Presentation anti-pattern cleanup relied on manual rg searches and reviewer judgment, so platform bridges, runtime hierarchy lookup, direct Unity logging, and plain View UseCase execution could regress without a harness finding.
prevention: Added deterministic Rule Harness static findings for Presentation platform bridges, runtime lookup, direct Debug logging, and plain View UseCase execution; added a presentation_policy_lint stage for PageController responsibility policy; documented the coverage and added fixture assertions for each finding type and lint-stage failure.
verification: Run tools/rule-harness/tests/Run-RuleHarnessTests.ps1, npm run --silent rules:sync-closeout, npm run --silent rules:lint, npm run --silent presentation:policy:lint, and dotnet build Assembly-CSharp.csproj --no-restore.
